sourceSummary.oneLine: SGS Korea test report for CFRP Plate item CFRP 1.5T covering RoHS substances Cd, Pb, Hg, Cr VI, PBBs and PBDEs.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Material compliance evidence for RoHS restricted substances testing of CFRP 1.5T.
keyPoints: Issued Date is 2014. 06. 02 and Test Report No. is F690101/LF-CTSAYAA14-27271.
Client-submitted sample was identified as Product Name: CFRP Plate, Item No./Part No.: CFRP 1.5T.
Cadmium, Lead, Mercury, Hexavalent Chromium, PBBs and PBDEs were reported as N.D.
Test methods reference IEC 62321:2013 and IEC 62321:2008.

entities.name: SGS Korea Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: Jeff Jang / Chemical Lab Mgr SGS Korea Co., Ltd.

entities.name: SGS Group
entities.evidence: SGS Korea Co.,Ltd. Member of the SGS Group (Société Générale de Surveillance)

concepts.name: RoHS testing
concepts.evidence: Testing Flow Chart for RoHS:Cd/Pb/Hg/Cr6+ /PBBs&PBDEs Testing

concepts.name: IEC 62321:2013
concepts.evidence: With reference to IEC 62321:2013, ICP Cadmium (Cd) N.D. mg/kg

concepts.name: IEC 62321:2008
concepts.evidence: With reference to IEC 62321:2008, UV-VIS Hexavalent Chromium (Cr VI) N.D. mg/kg

evidence.claim: The document is an SGS Korea test report issued on 2014. 06. 02.
evidence.evidenceText: Page 1 of 4 Issued Date : 2014. 06. 02 Test Report No. F690101/LF-CTSAYAA14-27271

evidence.claim: The tested product sample was CFRP Plate, item/part number CFRP 1.5T.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Name : CFRP Plate Item No./Part No. : CFRP 1.5T

evidence.claim: The SGS file number was AYAA14-27271.
Cadmium was not detected using a method referencing IEC 62321:2013 and ICP.
evidence.evidenceText: 0.5 With reference to IEC 62321:2013, ICP Cadmium (Cd) N.D. mg/kg

evidence.claim: Lead was not detected using a method referencing IEC 62321:2013 and ICP.
evidence.evidenceText: 5 With reference to IEC 62321:2013, ICP Lead (Pb) N.D. mg/kg

evidence.claim: Mercury was not detected using a method referencing IEC 62321:2013 and ICP.
evidence.evidenceText: 2 With reference to IEC 62321:2013, ICP Mercury (Hg) N.D. mg/kg

evidence.claim: Hexavalent Chromium was not detected using a method referencing IEC 62321:2008 and UV-VIS.
evidence.evidenceText: 1 With reference to IEC 62321:2008, UV-VIS Hexavalent Chromium (Cr VI) N.D. mg/kg

evidence.claim: PBB and PBDE flame retardants listed in the report were not detected using methods referencing IEC 62321:2008 and GC-MS.
evidence.evidenceText: Flame Retardants-PBBs/PBDEs Results MDL Test Method Unit Test Items 5 With reference to IEC 62321:2008, GC-MS Monobromobiphenyl N.D. mg/kg

evidence.claim: N.D. means not detected below the method detection limit.
The report states results refer only to the sample unless otherwise stated.
evidence.evidenceText: Unless otherwise stated the results shown in this test report refer only to the sample(s).

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is ambiguous: the document identifies SGS Korea Co., Ltd. as issuer/testing company, but no regulatory authority or jurisdiction is stated.
Test period text appears inconsistent: '2014. 06. 02 to 2014. 05. 29' is chronologically reversed.
No regulatory pass/fail conclusion or RoHS compliance declaration is explicitly stated; the report only provides test results for the submitted sample.
